sections.draft_text: The Supplier's Quotation includes pricing on the basis of Fixed Price, Outcome Based T&M (capped at a NTE Price), Time and Materials (T&M) (capped at a NTE Price), and a Combination of T&M and Fixed Price. Detailed pricing information is provided in the attached annexes, ensuring compliance with the tender requirements.

The Supplier accepts the draft contract terms as outlined in the RFQ. A PDF copy of the Supplier's Deed of Undertaking, duly signed, is included as part of this submission, in compliance with the tender requirements.

The Supplier will employ a robust project management methodology aligned with industry best practices to ensure successful delivery of the services. Our governance structure includes regular performance reviews and reporting to the Commonwealth, detailing compliance with Performance Measures and the Work Order. This approach ensures transparency and accountability, fostering continuous improvement.

The Supplier will deliver managed services using an ITIL-aligned service management framework. This includes comprehensive ITSM processes, SLAs, and defined escalation paths to ensure consistent service delivery. Our approach is designed to meet the Commonwealth's requirements and support operational efficiency.

The Supplier's transition approach is structured to ensure a seamless transition-in and transition-out process. This includes detailed planning, risk management, and stakeholder engagement to maintain service continuity and minimise disruption.

The Supplier will undertake sustainment of eTools and DDM from a Physical Zone 3 or higher site, as certified under the DSPF. Our security framework includes comprehensive controls and certifications to ensure compliance with the Commonwealth's security requirements.
